questionHtml: Outline the additional information that would be required to convert the food web into a pyramid of energy.
markschemeHtml:
1. energy content in biomass/all organisms of each trophic level;
  2. size of study area included;
  3. over period of time / per year;

meta.title: Outline the additional information that would be required to convert the food web into a pyramid of energy.
